series_metadata.series_title: Children's Trust Fund- Prevent Child Abuse Ohio
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to Children’s Trust Fund activities as the Prevent Child Abuse America Ohio Chapter. Includes capacity building plan and e-mail and correspondence related to Ohio Chapter services, communications, public policy ad marketing. Marketing includes, but is not limited to: news letters, reports and Prevent Child Abuse Ohio materials and activities.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office and 1 year in records center
